metadata.description: An opinionated Claude Code workflow + knowledge harness in three editions — un-themed (harness-core), bare themed (lite), and full Spider-Man (friendly-neighborhood). Install one.

plugins.name: harness-core
plugins.description: Un-themed edition: the full three-tier orchestration (objective → workstream → task) + knowledge-vault pipeline, observational hooks, statusline, and scaffolder. Original naming, no agent personas, no theme.

plugins.name: friendly-neighborhood-lite
plugins.description: Bare-minimum themed edition: the harness + Spider-Man skin and voice, a tiny agent roster, and the three mechanics — without the full cast, screenplay, themes, or phase-council.

plugins.name: friendly-neighborhood
plugins.description: Full themed edition: 32-agent Spider-cast, the 14-villain dissent council, contextual phase-council, screenplay output, a live per-character observation deck (VS Code), themes, and all three moral mechanics.
